Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in ['name','scripts','dependencies'] if k in d}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Content 'c:\\Users\\MSI\\Downloads\\myanmarosint-git\\public\\data\\myanmar-townships.geojson' -Raw | python3 -c \\"import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['properties']['TS_PCODE'], f['properties']['TS'], f['properties'].get\('DT',''\), f['properties'].get\('ST',''\)\) for f in data['features'] if 'mandalay' in str\(f['properties'].get\('TS',''\)\).lower\(\) or 'mandalay' in str\(f['properties'].get\('ST',''\)\).lower\(\) or 'mandalay' in str\(f['properties'].get\('DT',''\)\).lower\(\)]\\"")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./public/data/myanmar-townships.geojson','utf8'\)\); d.features.filter\(f=>f.properties.ST&&\(f.properties.ST.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('mandalay'\)||f.properties.TS.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('mandalay'\)\)\).forEach\(f=>console.log\(f.properties.TS_PCODE, '|', f.properties.TS, '|', f.properties.DT, '|', f.properties.ST\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./public/data/myanmar-cities.json','utf8'\)\); const matches=d.features.filter\(f=>{ const n=String\(f.properties.Town??f.properties.NAME??''\).toLowerCase\(\); return n.includes\('tan'\) && n.includes\('hlwe'\) || n.includes\('tanhlwe'\) || n.includes\('tan-hlwe'\); }\); matches.forEach\(f=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\(f.properties.Town??f.properties.NAME\), f.properties.Township, f.properties.State_Divi\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./public/data/myanmar-cities.json'\); const ts=n=>n.toLowerCase\(\).replace\(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'-'\).replace\(/^-|-$/g,''\); const matches=d.features.filter\(f=>{const n=String\(f.properties.Town||f.properties.NAME||''\); return /saw|yaw|gangaw|yegyi|falam|thantlang/i.test\(n\)}\); matches.forEach\(f=>{const n=String\(f.properties.Town||f.properties.NAME||''\); console.log\(ts\(n\), '|', n, '|', f.properties.ST||''\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const content=fs.readFileSync\('src/lib/bases-data.ts','utf8'\); const ids=content.match\(/id:\(\\d+\)/g\).map\(m=>parseInt\(m.replace\('id:',''\)\)\); console.log\('Max ID:', Math.max\(...ids\)\); console.log\('Total entries:', ids.length\)")
